channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Luka Doncic's Mavericks reunion was "so weird." He still gets a triple-double and a W for the Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Although Luka Doncic speaks four languages, he struggled for the words to express just how strange it was to play against the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lionel Messi strikes early, Inter Miami beats Sporting KC 3-1 to advance in Champions Cup
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi opened the scoring with a masterful strike in the 19th minute, and Inter Miami beat Sporting Kansas City 3-1 on Tuesday night in the second leg of the CONCACAF Champions Cup’s first round.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 30 goals in a season for an NHL-record-extending 19th time in 20-year career
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin reached 30 goals in a season for the 19th time in his 20-year NHL career, adding to the league record he set last season with his 18th. The Washington Capitals captain got his latest milestone goal Tuesday night at home against the Calgary Flames.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers prefers to play for Rams, who could trade Matthew Stafford this offseason: report
item.description: Aaron Rodgers is looking for his next NFL team, and one report says the Los Angeles Rams are his preference. But Matthew Stafford would have to be traded first.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CFP commissioners put off any decisions on changes to playoff format, including seeding of teams
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Conference commissioners who are part of the College Football Playoff had discussions Tuesday about possible changes for next season, including how the 12-team field is seeded.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Howie Roseman says the Eagles' roster will change as team begins quest for repeat title
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Howie Roseman’s forehead has healed from the beer can that left him bloodied at the Philadelphia Eagles’ victory parade, and the general manager is working on getting the team in position to repeat.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White victim of alleged extortion that involves FBI, lawyers say
item.description: Lawyers for Tampa Bay Buccaneers running back Rachaad White said in a statement on Tuesday that he is a victim of extortion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 28-year-old freshman at MiraCosta makes name as hoops star
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) — It might not look like it, but Ramel Bethea is old for a freshman — 28 years old to be exact. “Yea the age crazy," said Bethea, who is playing his first season of college basketball at MiraCosta College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Chen and Kerrigan are added to cast of a figure skating event benefiting victims of DC plane crash
item.description: Nathan Chen, Nancy Kerrigan and Peggy Fleming are among a bevy of figure skaters added to the cast of a benefit event this weekend in Washington, D.C., for victims of the midair collision and crash outside Ronald Reagan International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation
